security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://cdn.discordapp.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://discord.com https://cdn.discordapp.com https://*.turso.io wss://*.turso.io
